metadata.title: Autonymo | AI Operating Systems for Your Industry
metadata.description: We design, build, and deploy complete AI operating systems for Real Estate, Healthcare, and custom business solutions. Live in weeks, not months.

hero.title: Driving the AI transition that your company needs.
hero.subtitle: Your external AI team. We go inside your business, build what generates real impact, run it and make sure you stay ahead as technology evolves.

realEstate.title: Real Estate OS
realEstate.intro: Capture new owners before your competitors, respond to buyer leads in seconds, and automate contracts and coordination. Your agents focus on selling.

dental.title: Dental Clinic OS
dental.intro: Reactivate dormant patients via WhatsApp, automate booking and reminders, and fill empty chairs. Your front desk stops chasing, patients start coming back.

industrial.title: Industrial OS
industrial.intro: Monitor production lines in real time, automate supply chain coordination, and catch quality issues before they ship. Your factory runs smarter.

custom.title: Custom Solutions
custom.intro: We audit your operations, find where time and money are leaking, and build AI systems around how you actually work. No templates, no forced migrations.

explainer.description: A connected suite of AI-powered tools built for your industry: automated lead response, smart scheduling, document generation, real-time dashboards, and more — all working together, replacing manual processes across your entire operation.

whatWeBuild.label: What We Build
whatWeBuild.title: Industry-specific AI platforms, not generic tools.
whatWeBuild.subtitle: Each system is built around your industry's actual workflows — integrated with your existing tools, ready to deploy in weeks.

realEstate.label: Real Estate OS
realEstate.tagline: Capture owners, respond to leads in seconds, run your agency on AI.

module1.title: Lead Response Engine
module1.description: Respond to portal leads in seconds via WhatsApp — not hours. Automatic pre-qualification, enrichment, and intelligent agent distribution.

module2.title: Active Listing Management
module2.description: Stale listing alerts, price monitoring, post-visit owner reports, and activity tracking for every property in your portfolio.

module3.title: Owner Relationship Engine
module3.description: Re-engage past owners with market updates and automated nurture sequences. Build trust before they consider switching agencies.

module4.title: Contract Automation
module4.description: Generate reserva, arras, and commission agreements in clicks. Document checklists and closing milestone tracking included.

healthServices.label: Health Services OS
healthServices.tagline: Reactivate patients, fill chairs, automate communication.

module1.title: Smart Scheduling
module1.description: AI-powered booking across practitioners. Automatically fills cancellation gaps, reduces no-shows, and optimizes chair time.

module2.title: Patient Reactivation
module2.description: Automated outreach to dormant patients with personalized recall campaigns. Re-engage patients who haven't visited in months.

module3.title: Patient Communication Hub
module3.description: Unified WhatsApp, email, and SMS communications. Automated confirmations, follow-ups, and post-visit review requests.

module4.title: Insurance & Documentation
module4.description: Automate eligibility checks, claims processing, and clinical note generation. Reduce admin burden and speed up reimbursements.

leadGeneration.label: Lead Gen OS
leadGeneration.tagline: Fill your calendar with qualified leads on autopilot.

module1.title: Multi-Channel Capture
module1.description: Capture leads from web forms, social ads, LinkedIn, landing pages, and referrals into one unified pipeline — enriched and scored automatically.

module2.title: AI Lead Scoring
module2.description: Score every lead in real time based on behavioral signals, firmographic data, and intent indicators. Prioritize the hottest opportunities.

module3.title: Smart Nurture Sequences
module3.description: Deploy personalized email, LinkedIn, and SMS campaigns that adapt content and timing based on each prospect's engagement.

module4.title: AI Outbound Calling
module4.description: Automated cold outreach and follow-up calls with AI voice agents that qualify prospects and book meetings on your behalf.

custom.label: Custom Solutions
custom.tagline: AI operations tailored to your industry and processes.

module1.title: Workflow Automation
module1.description: Map and automate any business process end-to-end — from simple task routing to complex multi-system orchestration.

module2.title: Custom AI Agents
module2.description: Purpose-built AI agents trained on your data and business logic. Not generic — designed around your specific operations.

module3.title: System Integration
module3.description: Connect CRMs, ERPs, databases, APIs, and legacy systems into one intelligent, automated ecosystem.

module4.title: Dashboards & Analytics
module4.description: Real-time operational dashboards designed around your KPIs, data sources, and decision-making workflows.

items.item1: Leads sit for hours — prospects move on before you respond

cta.title: Ready to see what AI
cta.subtitle: Book a free 15-minute assessment. We'll show you where AI can make the biggest impact on your operations.

manifesto.heading1: You know AI will change your business.
manifesto.paragraph1: Not because you don’t want to. Not because you don’t see it coming. But because you’re busy running a business today. Hiring takes too long. Tools don’t fit. And nobody on your team has the bandwidth to figure out what actually works.
manifesto.paragraph2: Autonymo embeds into your operations, builds on the tools you already use, and improves your systems every month as the technology evolves. No disruption. No learning curve. Just results that compound.
manifesto.closing: We don’t care about hype. We care about what ships.

whyUs.label: Why Us
whyUs.heading: We don’t sell software. We do the work.

vendorItems.item1: Sell you a platform and disappear

ourItems.item1: Audit your operations before proposing anything
ourItems.item2: Build on top of your existing tools. No rip-and-replace
ourItems.item3: Deploy solutions tailored to how your business actually works
ourItems.item4: Measure success by the impact we generate for you

whyUs.bottomNote: For every €1 spent on software, €6 are spent on the work that software is supposed to do.

howItWorksSteps.label: How We Work
howItWorksSteps.heading: From first call to live system in 4 weeks.

step1.title: We audit your operations
step1.description: We map your processes, find where time and money are leaking, and identify the highest-impact opportunities. You get a clear picture of what’s worth building before we build anything.

step2.title: We build and deploy
step2.description: We take the highest-impact opportunity and build it. Live, working, integrated with your existing tools. First solution running in 4 weeks.

step3.title: We train, manage, and expand
step3.description: We train your team on the new system, monitor performance, and keep improving it. When you’re ready, we move to the next opportunity.

finalCta.defaultSubtitle: Book a free 30-minute assessment. We’ll identify where AI can make the biggest impact on your business.

whyWeDifferent.label: Why We’re Different
whyWeDifferent.heading: We don’t sell software. We understand your business first, then build exactly what you need.

defaultOur.item2: Build around your existing tools and processes

founder.label: The Founder
founder.heading: A team built to deliver.
founder.name: Arnau Fabrega
founder.bio1: I spent years at Deloitte helping large corporations in the financial industry. It was great training, but I kept noticing the same thing: AI was changing everything, and most businesses, especially small and mid-sized ones, had no idea what it could actually do for them.
founder.bio2: They didn’t know where to start, and even if they did, the technology moves so fast that what worked six months ago is already outdated.
founder.bio3: I started Autonymo because I wanted to be on the other side, not advising from a slide deck, but actually building and running the systems that make a difference. That’s what we do every day.

hero.label: Dental Clinic OS
hero.description: We reactivate dormant patients via WhatsApp, automate booking, and manage patient communication. Deployed on your existing clinic software, managed by our team.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.heading: The real cost of an empty chair.

item1.title: Patients who should be coming back
item1.description: Your database has hundreds of patients overdue for treatment. Nobody has time to reach out to all of them.

item2.title: Your front desk is the bottleneck
item2.description: Receptionists handle calls, scheduling, and billing all at once. Patient reactivation is always the first thing dropped.

item3.title: Revenue you can’t see
item3.description: A patient who comes for a hygiene generates far more than the cleaning fee. Every patient who doesn’t come back is a cascade of treatments that never happens.

whyDifferent.industryExample: We don’t send mass messages. We analyze each patient’s history and reactivate them for the specific treatment they need.

vendorItems.item2: Blast generic SMS to your database

ourItems.item1: Connect to your clinic management system
ourItems.item2: Personalized reactivation based on each patient’s treatment history

item1.title: Intelligent Patient Reactivation
item1.promise: Dormant patients come back for the care they need.
item1.description: Dormant patients receive personalized WhatsApp messages based on their treatment history. Not a generic reminder — a relevant conversation about the care they need. They book directly from the chat.

item2.title: Smart Appointment Booking
item2.promise: Patients book through WhatsApp, no back-and-forth.
item2.description: Patients book through WhatsApp, integrated with your clinic software. Real-time availability checks — no double bookings, no back-and-forth.

item3.title: Multi-Practitioner Scheduling
item3.promise: Every practitioner’s schedule stays full, automatically.
item3.description: Appointments coordinated across doctors, hygienists, and rooms automatically.

item4.title: Automated Reminders & Follow-up
item4.promise: No-shows drop. Your team stays off the phone.
item4.description: Confirmations, reminders, and post-visit follow-ups via WhatsApp. No-shows drop. Your team stays off the phone.

item5.title: Post-Visit Review Collection
item5.promise: Your reputation grows without anyone asking at the front desk.
item5.description: After each visit, patients get a simple prompt to leave a Google review. Your reputation grows without anyone asking at the front desk.

caseStudy.label: Case Study
caseStudy.heading: 90 days. One clinic. Real results.
caseStudy.description: A dental clinic in Spain with 3+ dentists and over 9,000 patient records.
caseStudy.insight: Reactivated patients don’t just come back for a cleaning. They come back into your ecosystem, and your doctors find treatments that would never have started otherwise. On average, every reactivated visit generated 4x more revenue than expected.

howWeWork.label: How We Work
howWeWork.heading: From first call to patients coming back in 3 weeks.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: We connect to your clinic software
step1.description: We integrate with your existing system. No migration, no new tools.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: The system starts reactivating your patient database
step2.description: We analyze who’s overdue and for what, and launch personalized WhatsApp conversations for each patient’s specific situation.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: We manage, optimize, and scale
step3.description: We monitor weekly, refine messaging, and expand to new campaign types. The system gets smarter. You get more patients back.

item1.question: Do we need to change our clinic software?
item1.answer: No. We connect to Gesden, Odontonet, Klini Kare, CliniWin, and others. Nothing changes for your team.

item2.question: Do we need to change our WhatsApp number?
item2.answer: No. Messages come from your clinic’s number. Patients see your clinic, not a third party.

item3.question: Will my front desk need to learn anything new?
item3.answer: No. This is completely done for you. Their workload decreases — patients arrive pre-booked.

item4.question: What about all the new incoming messages?
item4.answer: We help manage them. The system handles conversations and booking automatically. For messages that need a human, we make sure nothing falls through.

item5.question: Is this GDPR compliant?
item5.answer: Yes. We only contact patients who have given consent. We help you manage consent records and ensure full compliance.

item6.question: What do patients actually receive?
item6.answer: Natural WhatsApp messages personalized to their treatment history. Not marketing blasts — real conversations.

item7.question: How quickly will we see results?
item7.answer: Most clinics see confirmed appointments within the first 2 weeks.

item8.question: What if our schedule is already full?
item8.answer: The system checks real-time availability. If you fill up, we pause or focus on low-occupancy periods.

finalCta.heading: Let’s fill your chairs.
finalCta.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute assessment. We’ll show you how many dormant patients your clinic has and what reactivating them could mean for your revenue.

hero.label: Real Estate OS
hero.description: A complete AI-powered operating system for your real estate agency. Built around your processes, deployed on your tools, fine-tuned for you. We guide you through onboarding and stay on to optimize it every month.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.heading: Your agency runs on manual work. It doesn’t have to.

item1.title: Owners you’re not capturing
item1.description: Private owners list in your zone every week. By the time your team spots them, three agencies have already called.

item2.title: Leads going cold
item2.description: A buyer enquiry comes in at 8pm. By the time your agent sees it the next morning, they’ve already moved on.

item3.title: Agents doing ops instead of selling
item3.description: Your best salespeople spend half their day on admin, coordination, and data entry instead of closing deals.

whyDifferent.industryExample: This isn’t off-the-shelf software. It’s an operating system built around your agency. Your team operates it, we make sure it keeps getting better.

vendorItems.item2: Assume your team will figure it out

ourItems.item1: Build a system tailored to how your agency actually works
ourItems.item2: Deploy on your existing tools and portals

solutions.label: What We Deploy
solutions.heading: Four modules. One operating system.
solutions.subtitle: Every agency is different. We deploy the same core modules but fine-tune each one to your market, your team, and your processes.

item1.title: Intelligent CRM
item1.promise: All enquiries in one place, in real time.
item1.description: A CRM built specifically for your agency — not a generic platform you have to adapt to. Connected to every major property portal in your market, so all enquiries flow into one place in real time. Lead management, viewing coordination, automated follow-ups, deal tracking, and agent activity — all in one system designed around how your team actually works.

item2.title: Owner Capture
item2.promise: Contact new owners before your competitors.
item2.description: New owners entering the market in your zone are identified and flagged automatically. Your team contacts them first — before competitors even know the listing exists. Automated outreach, review-then-send workflows, and a pipeline to track every opportunity.

item3.title: Operations Management
item3.description: Contracts generated in minutes, not hours. Bilingual documents, scheduling, task coordination, and reporting — all automated. Your agents stop doing admin and start doing what they were hired for.

item4.title: Portfolio Reactivation
item4.promise: Stay top of mind with every past client.
item4.description: Past clients and inactive owners receive personalized outreach — market updates, valuation insights, relevant opportunities. When they’re ready to buy, sell, or list again, your agency is already top of mind.

caseStudy.label: Case Study
caseStudy.heading: Already running. Already delivering.
caseStudy.description: The Real Estate OS is live for agencies across Spain. Here’s what changes once it’s deployed.

item1.value: Lead response: from over an hour to under 30 seconds
item1.label: Every lead that comes in gets an instant, personalized response and is qualified automatically. Your agents only spend time on leads that are genuinely interested — no more chasing dead ends.

item2.label: Once a lead is qualified and the broker confirms interest, viewings are scheduled automatically. No back-and-forth, no missed opportunities.

item3.label: Your owners receive automatic updates on every enquiry, viewing, and market change. They feel attended to without your agents sending a single manual message. Better service, zero extra work.

item4.label: Strategic, automated follow-ups keep every past owner and client top of mind. When they’re ready to sell, list, or buy again, your agency is the first call — not a competitor they found online.

item5.value: Hundreds of new owner contacts every month
item5.label: The capture engine connects you with off-market owners in your zone before they list publicly. Your pipeline of exclusive listings grows on autopilot.

caseStudy.insight: Every deployment is different because every agency is different. We fine-tune the system to your market, your team, and your workflows, then we stay on to manage and improve it month after month.

howWeWork.label: How We Work
howWeWork.heading: From first call to live system in 4 weeks.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: We audit your operations
step1.description: We map your processes, identify where time and money are leaking, and define which modules to deploy first.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: We deploy and fine-tune your OS
step2.description: We build the system around your specific workflows, connect it to your existing tools, and go live with the highest-impact module first.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: We monitor, optimize, and expand
step3.description: Your team runs the system day-to-day. We check in monthly to review performance, fine-tune what’s working, and roll out new modules when you’re ready.

item1.question: Do we need to change our CRM?
item1.answer: No, we can integrate with your current one. But our CRM is built specifically for real estate agencies and is more powerful than anything else on the market. Most agencies that see it choose to upgrade. Worth a conversation.

item2.question: Do our agents need to learn new software?
item2.answer: We guide your team through the full onboarding. The system is designed to fit into your existing workflow, and we make sure everyone is comfortable before going live.

item3.question: What if my agency is small?
item3.answer: The OS is designed for agencies with at least 3–5 people. That said, we can adapt to smaller teams if needed.

item4.question: How is this different from buying a CRM?
item4.answer: A CRM is a tool you configure yourself. This is an operating system we build and fine-tune for your agency. We handle onboarding, and we stay involved monthly to make sure it evolves with your business.

item5.question: What portals do you integrate with?
item5.answer: All major ones. Idealista, Fotocasa, Habitaclia, Pisos.com, and others. Every enquiry flows into your system in real time.

item6.question: How quickly will we see results?
item6.answer: First module live within 2–4 weeks. Most agencies see measurable impact within the first month.

item7.question: What happens if we stop?
item7.answer: You keep everything we built. No lock-in.

item8.question: Do you work outside Spain?
item8.answer: Yes. Our team works in English, Spanish, and Catalan.

finalCta.heading: Let’s talk about your agency.
finalCta.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute assessment. We’ll map your operations and show you exactly where AI makes the biggest impact.

hero.label: Custom Solutions
hero.heading: AI operations built for your business. Not from a template.
hero.description: For companies with processes that don’t fit a standard product. We audit your operations, build AI systems around how you actually work, and stay on to manage and improve them.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.heading: You know AI could help. You just don’t know where to start.

item1.title: Manual processes eating your margin
item1.description: Your team spends hours on repetitive work that adds no value. Data entry, report generation, coordination, follow-ups. It all adds up.

item2.title: Tools that solved 60% of the problem
item2.description: You’ve tried off-the-shelf software. It never quite fits. The other 40% is still manual.

item3.title: No internal AI expertise
item3.description: You don’t have the team to evaluate what’s possible, build the right solution, or maintain it over time.

solutions.label: What We Deploy
solutions.heading: Every business is different. Here’s what we typically deploy.
solutions.promise: We don’t sell software. We understand your business first, then build exactly what you need.

item1.title: Process Automation
item1.promise: Eliminate repetitive manual work across your operations.
item1.description: Turn manual, repetitive workflows into systems that run without human intervention.

item2.title: Intelligent Document Processing
item2.promise: Extract and route information from documents automatically.
item2.description: Extract, classify, and route information from documents, emails, and forms automatically.

item3.title: AI-Powered Communication
item3.promise: Handle routine client conversations at scale.
item3.description: WhatsApp bots, voice agents, and automated outreach that handle routine conversations with your clients.

item4.title: Client and Lead Management
item4.promise: Automate your sales pipeline from capture to close.
item4.description: Custom CRM workflows, lead qualification, and follow-up automation tailored to your sales process.

item5.title: Dashboards and Reporting
item5.promise: See what matters in real time.
item5.description: Live dashboards that show what matters. No more compiling spreadsheets.

howToStart.heading: From first call to live system in 4 weeks.

howItWorks.heading: From first call to live system in 4 weeks.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: We audit your operations
step1.description: We map your processes, identify where time and money are leaking, and put a number on each opportunity. You get a clear picture of what’s worth automating and what isn’t.

step3.label: Step 3

item3.label: Reduction in manual work
item3.description: 60% reduction in manual work from the first solution

item4.label: You own everything
item4.description: You own everything we build, no vendor lock-in

item1.question: What industries do you work with?
item1.answer: Any. We’ve worked with real estate, healthcare, and professional services. The approach is the same: audit, build, manage.

item2.question: How much does it cost?
item2.answer: It depends on the project. We work best as your AI internal team over an extended period, typically several months. That said, we’re flexible at the start so you can see our work and build trust before committing long-term.

item3.question: Do we need technical skills?
item3.answer: No. We handle everything from design to deployment. Your team needs zero technical knowledge.

item4.question: How long before we see results?
item4.answer: First solution live within 4 weeks. Most clients see measurable impact within the first month.

item5.question: What happens if we stop?
item5.answer: You keep everything we built. No lock-in, no proprietary platforms.

item6.question: Can you work with our existing systems?
item6.answer: Yes. We build on top of what you already use. No rip-and-replace.

finalCta.heading: Let’s look at your operations.
finalCta.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute assessment. We’ll identify where AI can make the biggest impact on your business.

hero.label: Industrial OS
hero.description: We monitor production lines in real time, automate supply chain coordination, and catch quality issues before they ship. Deployed on your existing systems, managed by our team.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.heading: Your factory runs on manual tracking. It doesn’t have to.

item1.title: Production blind spots
item1.description: You don’t know a line is down until someone walks over. Manual logs mean you’re always reacting, never predicting.

item2.title: Supply chain firefighting
item2.description: Materials arrive late, orders change, and your team spends half their day on calls and spreadsheets trying to keep production on schedule.

item3.title: Quality caught too late
item3.description: Defects are found at final inspection or worse — by the customer. Each recall or rework eats into margin and trust.

whyDifferent.industryExample: We don’t sell dashboards. We connect to your PLCs, ERP, and MES, then build intelligence layers that actually reduce downtime and waste.

ourItems.item1: Connect to your existing PLCs, ERP, and MES
ourItems.item2: Deploy production-specific AI models in weeks
ourItems.item3: Custom alerts and workflows for your processes

item1.title: Production Monitoring
item1.promise: See every line, every machine, in real time.
item1.description: Live dashboards connected to your PLCs and sensors. Track OEE, cycle times, and throughput across every production line. Anomalies trigger instant alerts so your team acts before problems cascade.

item2.title: Supply Chain Automation
item2.promise: Materials arrive when you need them, not when you remember to order.
item2.description: Automated purchase orders triggered by real consumption data. Supplier lead times, inventory levels, and production schedules synchronized in one system. No more stockouts, no more overstock.

item3.title: Quality Control Systems
item3.promise: Catch defects at the source, not at the dock.
item3.description: AI-powered inspection and statistical process control integrated into your production flow. Detect deviations early, trace root causes automatically, and reduce scrap rates without slowing the line.

item4.title: Predictive Maintenance
item4.description: Vibration, temperature, and performance data analyzed continuously. The system predicts failures days in advance and schedules maintenance during planned downtime — not in the middle of a production run.

caseStudy.label: Case Study
caseStudy.heading: 6 months. One manufacturer. Real results.
caseStudy.description: A mid-market manufacturer in Spain with 3 production lines and 85 employees.
caseStudy.insight: The biggest wins came from connecting systems that had never talked to each other. Once production data, supplier timelines, and quality metrics lived in one place, the operations team could make decisions in minutes that used to take days of spreadsheet analysis.

howWeWork.label: How We Work
howWeWork.heading: From first call to live monitoring in 4 weeks.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: We audit your production floor
step1.description: We walk your lines, map your systems, and identify the highest-impact opportunities for automation and monitoring.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: We connect and deploy
step2.description: We integrate with your PLCs, ERP, and MES. First monitoring dashboards and alerts go live within 4 weeks.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: We optimize and expand
step3.description: We monitor performance weekly, refine models, and roll out additional modules — quality control, predictive maintenance, supply chain — as you’re ready.

item1.question: Does this work with our existing ERP?
item1.answer: Yes. We integrate with SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics, Odoo, and most mid-market ERPs. No rip-and-replace.

item2.question: How long does implementation take?
item2.answer: First module live in 4 weeks. Full deployment across production, quality, and supply chain typically takes 3–6 months depending on complexity.

item3.question: What industries do you work with?
item3.answer: Any discrete or process manufacturing. We’ve worked with automotive suppliers, food processing, metal fabrication, and plastics. The approach adapts to your specific production environment.

item4.question: Do we need to install new sensors?
item4.answer: Usually not. Most modern PLCs and machines already generate the data we need. If gaps exist, we recommend targeted additions — not a full retrofit.

item5.question: What about data security?
item5.answer: Your production data stays on your infrastructure. We use encrypted connections and follow industrial cybersecurity best practices. No data leaves your network without your explicit approval.

item6.question: How do you handle the ongoing management?
item6.answer: We check in monthly to review system performance, update models as your processes evolve, and expand to new use cases when you’re ready.

item7.question: What if we stop working together?
item7.answer: You keep everything we built. Dashboards, integrations, models — it’s all yours. No vendor lock-in.

finalCta.heading: Let’s optimize your production floor.
finalCta.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute assessment. We’ll walk through your operations and show you where AI monitoring and automation can make the biggest impact.

hero.label: Book a Free Assessment
hero.heading: Let’s find where AI can make the biggest impact.
hero.description: A free 15-minute call to understand your situation, identify opportunities, and see if we can help. No commitment, no pitch.

whatHappensNext.label: What Happens Next
whatHappensNext.heading: From first call to live system in 4 weeks.

step1.title: We talk
step1.description: A 15-minute call to understand your business, your challenges, and whether we can help.

step2.title: We audit
step2.description: We map your operations, find where time and money are leaking, and identify the biggest opportunities.

step3.title: First automation goes live
step3.description: We build the highest-impact solution first. Live, working, and saving you time within 4 weeks.

hero.label: About Autonymo
hero.heading2: We make sure you’re on the right side of it.
hero.description: Not as a consultant. Not as a software vendor. As your external AI team.

theShift.label: The Shift
theShift.heading: Something permanent is happening.
theShift.paragraph1: For decades, the gap between large corporations and small businesses was defined by access. Access to talent, to technology, to the infrastructure that compounds over time.
theShift.paragraph2: AI is collapsing that gap. For the first time, a 30-person manufacturing company can operate with the same intelligence infrastructure as a Fortune 500. The tools exist. The models exist. What most businesses lack is the team to put it together and keep it running.
theShift.closing: That’s the opening Autonymo was built for.

whoWeAre.label: Who We Are
whoWeAre.heading: We don’t consult. We build.
whoWeAre.paragraph1: Autonymo is an AI engineering team based in Barcelona. We work with small and mid-sized businesses that know AI matters but don’t know where to start, or have tried and been disappointed.
whoWeAre.paragraph2: We go inside the business. We spend time understanding how it actually works: the processes, the bottlenecks, the workarounds that have existed for years. Then we build AI systems that fit into that reality. Not templates. Not off-the-shelf platforms. Systems designed for how this specific business operates.
whoWeAre.paragraph3: We deploy fast. First solution live in 4 weeks. Then we stay on, monitoring, improving, and expanding as the business grows and as AI evolves.
whoWeAre.paragraph4: Every improvement in AI makes our service faster, cheaper, and more powerful. We pass that directly to our clients.

item1.title: Based in Barcelona
item1.description: Working with businesses across Spain and Europe in English, Spanish, and Catalan.

item2.title: Live in 4 weeks
item2.description: First automation deployed fast. Then we stay on to manage, optimize, and expand.

item3.title: No lock-in
item3.description: You keep everything we build. No proprietary platforms, no forced migrations.

whyWeExist.label: Why We Exist
whyWeExist.heading: For every €1 spent on software, €6 are spent on the work.
whyWeExist.paragraph1: The AI industry has spent years building tools for the people doing the work. Copilots. Assistants. Productivity layers.
whyWeExist.paragraph2: We think the bigger opportunity is different. Most businesses don’t need another tool. They need someone to do the work, and do it better than any human team could.
whyWeExist.closing: That’s what autopilots do. And that’s what we build.

theTeam.label: The Team
theTeam.heading: Based in Barcelona. Built to move fast.
theTeam.description1: We’re a small team of engineers, operators, and builders. We move fast, we care about every client as if it were our own business, and we measure ourselves by the impact we generate, not by the hours we bill or the licenses we sell.
theTeam.description2: We’re early. We’re hungry. And we believe the companies that adopt AI now will define their industries for the next decade.

founder.name: Arnau Fabrega
founder.bio1: I spent years at Deloitte helping large corporations in the financial industry. It was great training, but I kept noticing the same thing: AI was changing everything, and most businesses, especially small and mid-sized ones, had no idea what it could actually do for them.
founder.bio2: They didn’t know where to start, and even if they did, the technology moves so fast that what worked six months ago is already outdated.
founder.bio3: I started Autonymo because I wanted to be on the other side, not advising from a slide deck, but actually building and running the systems that make a difference. That’s what we do every day.
